prompt: A classic internet meme setup: 'My brain cells' in bold white Impact font with a thick black outline, positioned prominently at the top. The image below is a photograph of a single, small candle flame flickering precariously, almost out, against a dark, blurry background, humorously symbolizing a dwindling resource.
prompt_refined: Generate an image depicting a classic internet meme. At the top of the image, display the text "My brain cells" in bold white Impact font with a thick black outline. Below this text, occupy the rest of the image with a photograph of a single, small candle flame, flickering precariously and almost out, against a dark, blurry background.
objects: Text "My brain cells" at the top of the image
Single candle flame below the text
